summary: Collapse the dead 6h initializer; staleAfter is just the 168h literal.
reason: Template emitted `staleAfter := 6*time.Hour; if d, err := time.ParseDuration("168h"); err == nil { staleAfter = d }` — the literal ParseDuration never errors, so 6h was always overwritten. Patched per Greptile P2.
upstream_issue: TODO: file upstream — generator's auto_refresh template should emit the literal directly when the cache stale_after is a constant.
